# Hauberk of Mail

> [!tip] 👑 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Leadership

*Item. Armor.*

---

Attach to a **_Dale_** or **_Warrior_** character. Limit 1 per character.
Attached character gets +1 DEF (and +1 hit point if attached character has the sentinel keyword).
